scripts.dev:api:q: echo 'API running quietly — logs at logs/api/' && npm --prefix apps/api run dev:all > /dev/null 2>&1
scripts.build: npm run -w @khef/kvec build && npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/ui run build && npm --prefix apps/api/mcp-server run build
scripts.test:db:up: docker compose --env-file apps/api/.env -f docker-compose.test.yml -p khef-test up -d
scripts.test:db:down: docker compose --env-file apps/api/.env -f docker-compose.test.yml -p khef-test down
scripts.metrics:up: docker compose -f infra/khef-metrics/docker-compose.yml --env-file apps/api/.env -p khef-metrics up -d
scripts.licenses:generate: rm -rf licenses && npx --yes license-checker-rseidelsohn --production --files licenses/api --start apps/api && npx --yes license-checker-rseidelsohn --production --files licenses/ui --start apps/ui
scripts.audit:all: echo '=== root ===' && npm audit; echo '=== apps/api ===' && npm --prefix apps/api audit; echo '=== apps/ui ===' && npm --prefix apps/ui audit; echo '=== apps/api/mcp-server ===' && npm --prefix apps/api/mcp-server audit; echo done
scripts.setup: cp -n apps/api/.env.example apps/api/.env 2>/dev/null; cp -n apps/ui/.env.example apps/ui/.env 2>/dev/null; npm run install:all && npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed:sync
scripts.refresh: npm run db:migrate && npm run install:all && npm run db:seed:sync
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix apps/api install && npm --prefix apps/ui install && npm run -w @khef/kvec build && npm run mcp:build && npm run hooks:install && npm run shell:install && npm run kf:install && npm run voice:install && npm run voice:app:install && npm run check:rg && npm run check:clamav
scripts.voice:app:start: npm run voice:app:bundle && open apps/voice/dist/Khef\ Voice.app
scripts.voice:app:install: npm run voice:app:bundle && pkill -x KhefVoiceApp 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p ~/Applications && rm -rf ~/Applications/'Khef Voice.app' && cp -R 'apps/voice/dist/Khef Voice.app' ~/Applications/
